reviews.review_description:
Honest review abt the game (currently) :

Visuals / graphics: 10/10: 
The graphics, shaders, looks are super beautiful. I genuinely have never seen more beautiful graphics in a gtag fan game than this, it actually reminds me of 2023 for some reason!

Movement: 3.8/10: 
Janky, but really funny! Sometimes I stick to the ground, and sometimes I go flying

Mechanics: 2.7/10:
Very (and I mean VERY) janky, sometimes it works, but most of the time doesnt work (for example, the grabbing system is a bit broken, I cant join a lobby, cant join gamemodes, etc.).

Idea: 9.5/10:
The game idea is good, and pretty original imo, even tho capuchin did something similar back in 2023, its rare to see a sandbox typa thing in gtag fangames!

Player model / other models: 9.7/10:
The player model looks very good! And so so the models for different stuff like guns and etc, they look very nice and realistic!


uhhh overall rating!:  7.14/10 (or 4 stars out of 5):
The games idea is fine, but executed badly, lots of bugs, lobbies dont works, but other than that - the other parts of the game are good, like the looks, etc. you should def try to fix them, and try to add more stuff!
This is the best but there are bugs like i cant grab and join maps but don't hate on this game please
Impossible to grab a gun or knife
I’m gonna go check out this game and come back

reviews.review_title: Ther are a few bugs though
reviews.review_description: The game used to be really good last time i played it, but now it's just horrible. The hands are backwards, buttons don't work AND you can't pick up anything

developer_response.body: Yes, The newest update is bad as of right now. This update will fix these issues and solve problems you may have. Please join our discord our developers are updating about the next update and the mistakes that have been made and why these bugs our there.

reviews.review_description: My problems are that my hands stick to the ground, buttons don't work, and my hands are upside down. I am also positive that you lied about who made the game, Garry Newman retired from video games, and SLZ does not work with small indie devs on passion projects, or should i say, rip offs. This game has potential i feel. Just stop lying and fix it.

developer_response.body: Firstly the problem with the hands sticking to the ground we have fixed that issue in this next update coming soon along with other bugs which we have talked about on our discord. Secondly the game was made by Virtual Immersions but is owned by Jma.Dev. Also Garry Newman is not devolving for the game, as we have said in discord and other places Garry Newman is giving us ideas towards the game from Garry's mod. We do have proof of conversations with Garry. Please join our discord for information.

reviews.review_description: Is crazy to get mods to help

every time i load into the game i just get stuck in the floor like it's impossible for me to play and i even waited 2 days to play this and i get rewarded with this please fix your game actually does game actually sucks

developer_response.body: This next upcoming update will fix these bugs. Please join our discord for information!

The second i joined i fell through the floor

developer_response.body: Hello User, some other users have had this problem. We are working to fix issues inside the game with problems like this one. This next update will fix all issues you may have. Please join our discord so you know what we are fixing.

reviews.review_description: You fall through the floor, fix it. Onto download until its fixed, no point (using 5 stars to get attention from devs)

developer_response.body: Falling through the floor is a issues multiple people have which we have fixed in this new update coming soon. It was a problem with spawning, and we have fixed that in this upcoming update. Please join our discord for updates!

reviews.review_description: Pls fix the hands they are back words
Everything is broken multiplayer doesn’t even work in the owner is actually buns at making games. ￼ just go get the original one is 10 times better this one’s just a trash version. ￼

developer_response.body: Firstly the multiplayer was broken due to a modder who was mad and modded our servers which we now just resolved this issue. This next update will fix problems. Please join our discord for updates.

reviews.review_description:
Bro, this is just Gorillas Mod but with a “2” slapped on to attract little kids. This is a mid game with an extremely dodgy developer who doxxed someone, extreme lag, and no parkour at all. I am genuinely so glad I got rid of this abomination. I would rather play Portal: Forbidden Testing Tracks 90 times in a row than play this lazy clone of Gorillas Mod.

TL;DR: Save your money and buy Garry’s Mod. Or get Gorillas Mod, which is free. Or just play Gorilla Tag.

PS: Devs, don’t you dare hit me with a “iF yOuRe HeRe To CoMpLaIn AbOut OwNeR, gO TaKe It sOmEwHeRe ElSe”. Where do I go, Mars? I WILL complain about the owner HERE. THE OWNER IS PART OF THE GAME, THAT WILL NEVER CHANGE. And what are you gonna do, nuke my house? If you won’t have me as a player, I don’t care. You can’t just go up to someone and say “You complained about our owner, stop playing our game immediately!”. If I did something wrong as a developer of a gtag fan game (I am currently making one, unity just won’t build the apk, games called Orangutag, available on itch io  by“idkwhattoputherebro”.), I would apologize, not force my dev team to lynch everyone who exposes me.

Edit: I have also flagged this game as a fake app, and told Meta it is a copy of Gorillas Mod, and the creator doxxed someone.

Edit 2: I have also seen the creator of this clone give a 5 star review to this game. Not slick.

Edit 3: “owner lost it” my backside, also you can still get the original game.

developer_response.body: Firstly, Please join the discord and talk to us. We want no user having a bad experience and we are working on fixing stuff. Due to the old owner kicking the new owner of the applab page the new owner lost access and the old owner told him to make a new one so he did, so there for this is not a copy. We have fire devs due to your experience. Please join our discord or text Jma_dev on discord if you need info or need help. Next time talk to the owner before making a review to understand you info. Thanks.

reviews.review_description: The game owner probably just put those stress level zero on it to make you want the game more

developer_response.body: No, the reason for putting SLZ on the game is because when talking to the head of the game such as admin and higher ups in the company they gave me permission to make a game inspired like theirs, but they wanted credits inside of the game which I did give to them.

reviews.review_title: Might be one of the best fan games!
reviews.review_description: This might be one of the best fan games out there if you can even call it a fan game. It’s so unique in the campaign mode makes it so enjoyable. when you look at other people‘s reviews, you understand why people don’t like it but then like you go into the game and none of it ever happens. It’s basically a perfect game so I definitely recommend gorilla mod 2.￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing!!

reviews.review_description: The game is great. I personally had fun with it. However it’s not the most perfect game I’ve played. For example, it’s laggy. I recommend optimizing it for weaker headsets like the quest 2. Also I love the tutorial and how it’s like boneworks tutorial. This game has big potential. Keep trying. This was a good experience. (P.S. sorry for your losses. It’s hard to go through them. I would know. As my mom died.)

developer_response.body: Thanks for playing and I am sorry for your loss. Losing someone you love is hard thats why I started making fan games.

reviews.review_description: This is the best game I’ve played in a long time so original and so organic and not laggy it makes me wanna smash a girl top game ive played

developer_response.body: Thanks and same!

developer_response.body: This is the real one. The old page is the old one. The owner lost access to it and had to make a new one to continue to make updates.
